## Checklist

- [ ] `make validate` passes (build + tests + no-network check)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for any logic changes (in `Tests/GoToBedCoreTests`)
- [ ] PR title uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
      (`fix:`, `feat:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, …) — this drives the automated version bump
- [ ] No networking APIs or network entitlement introduced (the app is fully offline)
